    mov     rdx, r12
    mov     r8, r13
    not     r8
    add     r8, ENCODER_ADD_DELTA
    call    Encoder_Rotate
    
    ; Layer 3: XOR with original key
    mov     rcx, rbx
    mov     rdx, r12
    mov     r8, r13
    call    Encoder_XOR
    
    pop     r13
    pop     r12
    pop     rbx
    ret
Encoder_Polymorphic ENDP

; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; PeGen_EncodeSection - Encode a section
; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; RCX = pContext
; RDX = SectionIndex
; R8  = Method (0=XOR, 1=Rotate, 2=Polymorphic)
; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
PeGen_EncodeSection PROC FRAME
    push    rbx
    push    rsi
    push    rdi
    push    r12
    push    r13
    
    mov     rbx, rcx
    mov     r12d, edx
    mov     r13d, r8d
    
    ; Get section header
    mov     rax, r12
    mov     ecx, SIZEOF SECTION_TEMPLATE
    mul     ecx
    mov     rsi, (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).pSectionHeaders
    add     rsi, rax
    
    ; Get section data location
    mov     edi, [rsi+20]               ; PointerToRawData
    mov     rcx, (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).pDosHeader
    add     rcx, rdi                    ; rcx = pData
    
    mov     edx, [rsi+16]               ; rdx = SizeOfRawData
    mov     r8, (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).EncoderKey
    
    ; Call appropriate encoder
    cmp     r13d, 0
    je      @@use_xor
    cmp     r13d, 1
    je      @@use_rotate
    
@@use_polymorphic:
    call    Encoder_Polymorphic
    jmp     @@encoding_done
    
@@use_xor:
    call    Encoder_XOR
    jmp     @@encoding_done
    
@@use_rotate:
    call    Encoder_Rotate
    
@@encoding_done:
    mov     (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).IsEncoded, 1
    mov     (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).EncoderMethod, r13d
    
    mov     eax, 1
    pop     r13
    pop     r12
    pop     rdi
    pop     rsi
    pop     rbx
    ret
PeGen_EncodeSection ENDP

; ================================================================================
; IMPORT TABLE GENERATION
; ================================================================================

; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; PeGen_AddImport - Add import to PE
; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; RCX = pContext
; RDX = pDllName
; R8  = pFunctionName
; R9  = Ordinal (0 if using name)
; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
PeGen_AddImport PROC FRAME
    push    rbx
    push    rsi
    push    rdi
    push    r12
    push    r13
    push    r14
    push    r15
    
    mov     rbx, rcx
    mov     r12, rdx                    ; r12 = pDllName
    mov     r13, r8                     ; r13 = pFunctionName
    mov     r14d, r9d                   ; r14d = Ordinal
    
    ; Check import limit
    mov     eax, (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).NumImports
    cmp     eax, MAX_IMPORTS
    jae     @@import_failed
    
    ; For now, just store in context (simplified)
    ; Real implementation would build import directory
    
    inc     (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).NumImports
    
    mov     eax, 1
    jmp     @@import_done
    
@@import_failed:
    xor     eax, eax
    
@@import_done:
    pop     r15
    pop     r14
    pop     r13
    pop     r12
    pop     rdi
    pop     rsi
    pop     rbx
    ret
PeGen_AddImport ENDP

; ================================================================================
; FINALIZATION AND OUTPUT
; ================================================================================

; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; PeGen_Finalize - Finalize PE and calculate sizes
; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; RCX = pContext
; RDX = EntryPointRVA
; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
PeGen_Finalize PROC FRAME
    push    rbx
    push    rsi
    push    rdi
    
    mov     rbx, rcx
    mov     esi, edx
    
    ; Set entry point
    mov     rdi, (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).pOptionalHeader
    mov     dword ptr [rdi+16], esi     ; AddressOfEntryPoint
    
    ; Calculate total image size
    mov     eax, (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).NumSections
    test    eax, eax
    jz      @@no_sections
    
    dec     eax
    mov     ecx, SIZEOF SECTION_TEMPLATE
    mul     ecx
    mov     rsi, (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).pSectionHeaders
    add     rsi, rax
    
    mov     eax, [rsi+12]               ; VirtualAddress
    add     eax, [rsi+8]                ; + VirtualSize
    add     eax, 0xFFF
    and     eax, 0xFFFFF000             ; Align to section alignment
    
    mov     dword ptr [rdi+56], eax     ; SizeOfImage
    
@@no_sections:
    ; Set SizeOfHeaders
    mov     rax, (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).pSectionHeaders
    mov     rcx, (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).NumSections
    mov     edx, SIZEOF SECTION_TEMPLATE
    mul     edx
    add     rax, 24                     ; + section headers
    add     rax, (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).pDosHeader
    sub     rax, (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).pDosHeader
    add     eax, 0x1FF
    and     eax, 0xFFFFFE00
    mov     dword ptr [rdi+60], eax     ; SizeOfHeaders
    
    mov     eax, 1
    pop     rdi
    pop     rsi
    pop     rbx
    ret
PeGen_Finalize ENDP

; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; PeGen_WriteToFile - Write PE to disk
; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; RCX = pContext
; RDX = pFileName
; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
PeGen_WriteToFile PROC FRAME
    push    rbx
    push    rsi
    push    rdi
    push    r12
    push    r13
    push    r14
    
    mov     rbx, rcx
    mov     r12, rdx
    
    ; Calculate final size
    mov     rax, (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).CurrentOffset
    mov     r13, rax                    ; r13 = final offset
    sub     r13, (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).pDosHeader
    
    ; Create file
    mov     rcx, r12                    ; lpFileName
    mov     edx, 0x40000000             ; dwDesiredAccess = GENERIC_WRITE
    xor     r8d, r8d                    ; dwShareMode = 0
    xor     r9d, r9d                    ; lpSecurityAttributes = NULL
    push    0                           ; hTemplateFile
    push    0x80                        ; dwFlagsAndAttributes = FILE_ATTRIBUTE_NORMAL
    push    2                           ; dwCreationDisposition = CREATE_ALWAYS
    sub     rsp, 32
    call    qword ptr [__imp_CreateFileA]
    add     rsp, 48
    
    cmp     rax, -1
    je      @@write_failed
    mov     r14, rax                    ; r14 = hFile
    
    ; Write data
    xor     r9d, r9d                    ; lpOverlapped = NULL
    lea     r8, [rsp-8]                 ; lpNumberOfBytesWritten
    mov     rdx, r13                    ; nNumberOfBytesToWrite
    mov     rcx, (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).pDosHeader  ; lpBuffer
    
    sub     rsp, 40
    call    qword ptr [__imp_WriteFile]
    add     rsp, 40
    
    test    eax, eax
    jz      @@write_cleanup
    
    ; Close file
    mov     rcx, r14
    call    qword ptr [__imp_CloseHandle]
    
    mov     eax, 1
    jmp     @@write_done
    
@@write_cleanup:
    mov     rcx, r14
    call    qword ptr [__imp_CloseHandle]
    
@@write_failed:
    xor     eax, eax
    
@@write_done:
    pop     r14
    pop     r13
    pop     r12
    pop     rdi
    pop     rsi
    pop     rbx
    ret
PeGen_WriteToFile ENDP

; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; PeGen_Cleanup - Free resources
; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; RCX = pContext
; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
PeGen_Cleanup PROC FRAME
    push    rbx
    
    mov     rbx, rcx
    
    ; Free buffer
    mov     rcx, (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).pBuffer
    test    rcx, rcx
    jz      @@no_buffer
    
    xor     edx, edx                    ; dwFreeType = MEM_RELEASE
    mov     r8d, 0                      ; dwSize = 0 (release all)
    call    qword ptr [__imp_VirtualFree]
    
@@no_buffer:
    ; Zero context
    mov     rdi, rbx
    mov     rcx, SIZEOF PEGENCTX
    xor     eax, eax
    rep     stosb
    
    pop     rbx
    ret
PeGen_Cleanup ENDP

; ================================================================================
; UTILITY FUNCTIONS
; ================================================================================

; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; PeGen_CalculateChecksum - Calculate PE checksum
; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; RCX = pPEBuffer
; RDX = Size
; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
PeGen_CalculateChecksum PROC FRAME
    push    rsi
    push    rdi
    
    mov     rsi, rcx
    mov     rdi, rdx
    xor     eax, eax                    ; checksum
    xor     ecx, ecx                    ; high bits
    
    shr     rdi, 1                      ; Process words
    jz      @@checksum_done
    
@@checksum_loop:
    movzx   edx, word ptr [rsi]
    add     eax, edx
    adc     eax, ecx
    mov     ecx, 0
    adc     ecx, 0
    add     rsi, 2
    dec     rdi
    jnz     @@checksum_loop
    
    ; Add high bits to low
    add     eax, ecx
    
    ; Fold to 16 bits
    mov     edx, eax
    shr     edx, 16
    and     eax, 0xFFFF
    add     eax, edx
    
    ; Final fold
    mov     edx, eax
    shr     edx, 16
    add     eax, edx
    and     eax, 0xFFFF
    
@@checksum_done:
    pop     rdi
    pop     rsi
    ret
PeGen_CalculateChecksum ENDP

; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; PeGen_UpdateChecksum - Update PE checksum in header
; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
; RCX = pContext
; --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
PeGen_UpdateChecksum PROC FRAME
    push    rbx
    push    rsi
    
    mov     rbx, rcx
    
    ; Calculate current size
    mov     rax, (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).CurrentOffset
    mov     rsi, rax
    sub     rsi, (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).pDosHeader
    
    ; Calculate checksum
    mov     rcx, (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).pDosHeader
    mov     rdx, rsi
    call    PeGen_CalculateChecksum
    
    ; Update header (offset 0x58 in optional header)
    mov     rsi, (PEGENCTX PTR [rbx]).pOptionalHeader
    add     rsi, 64
    mov     dword ptr [rsi], eax
    
    pop     rsi
    pop     rbx
    ret
PeGen_UpdateChecksum ENDP

; ================================================================================
; DECODER STUB (For encoded PEs)
; ================================================================================

; This stub is injected into the PE to decode at runtime
DecoderStub PROC
    ; Save registers
    push    rax
    push    rcx
    push    rdx
    push    rsi
    push    rdi
    push    r8
    push    r9
    
    ; Get current RIP
    call    @@get_rip
@@get_rip:
    pop     rsi
    sub     rsi, 5                      ; Adjust to stub start
    
    ; Decode parameters follow the stub
    mov     rax, [rsi+64]               ; Decode key
    mov     rcx, [rsi+72]               ; Data offset
    mov     rdx, [rsi+80]               ; Data size
    mov     r8, [rsi+88]                ; Method
    
    ; Apply decoding
    add     rsi, rcx                    ; rsi = data to decode
    
    cmp     r8, 0
    je      @@decode_xor
    cmp     r8, 1
    je      @@decode_rotate
    
@@decode_polymorphic:
    ; Reverse: XOR, Rotate, XOR
    call    @@decode_xor_internal
    ; Reverse rotate
    mov     r8, rax
    not     r8
    add     r8, ENCODER_ADD_DELTA
    call    @@decode_rotate_internal
    rol     rax, ENCODER_ROL_BITS
    sub     rax, r8
    mov     [rsi], rax
    ; Final XOR
    rol     rax, 17
    xor     [rsi], rax
    jmp     @@decode_done
    
@@decode_xor:
    call    @@decode_xor_internal
    jmp     @@decode_done
    
@@decode_rotate:
    call    @@decode_rotate_internal
    jmp     @@decode_done
    
@@decode_xor_internal:
    push    rsi
    push    rdx
@@xor_loop:
    mov     rax, [rsi]
    xor     rax, r8
    mov     [rsi], rax
    add     rsi, 8
    sub     rdx, 8
    jnz     @@xor_loop
    pop     rdx
    pop     rsi
    ret
    
@@decode_rotate_internal:
    push    rsi
    push    rdx
@@rotate_loop:
    mov     rax, [rsi]
    rol     rax, ENCODER_ROL_BITS
    sub     rax, r8
    mov     [rsi], rax
    add     rsi, 8
    sub     rdx, 8
    jnz     @@rotate_loop
    pop     rdx
    pop     rsi
    ret
    
@@decode_done:
    ; Restore registers
    pop     r9
    pop     r8
    pop     rdi
    pop     rsi
    pop     rdx
    pop     rcx
    pop     rax
    
    ; Jump to original entry point
    db      0xE9                        ; JMP rel32
    dd      0                           ; Offset patched at generation
    
DecoderStub ENDP

DecoderStubSize EQU $ - DecoderStub

header_code = '''// ================================================================================
// RawrXD PE Generator - C/C++ Header
// ================================================================================
// Pure MASM x64 PE generator/encoder interface
// ================================================================================

#ifndef RAWRXD_PE_GENERATOR_H
#define RAWRXD_PE_GENERATOR_H

#include <windows.h>
#include <cstdint>

#ifdef __cplusplus
extern "C" {
#endif

// ================================================================================
// CONSTANTS
// ================================================================================

#define PEGEN_MAX_SECTIONS      16
#define PEGEN_MAX_IMPORTS       256
#define PEGEN_MAX_EXPORTS       64

// Encoding methods
#define ENCODE_XOR              0
#define ENCODE_ROTATE           1
#define ENCODE_POLYMORPHIC      2

// Section characteristics helpers
#define SEC_CODE                (IMAGE_SCN_CNT_CODE | IMAGE_SCN_MEM_EXECUTE | IMAGE_SCN_MEM_READ)
#define SEC_DATA                (IMAGE_SCN_CNT_INITIALIZED_DATA | IMAGE_SCN_MEM_READ | IMAGE_SCN_MEM_WRITE)
#define SEC_RDATA               (IMAGE_SCN_CNT_INITIALIZED_DATA | IMAGE_SCN_MEM_READ)
#define SEC_UDATA               (IMAGE_SCN_CNT_UNINITIALIZED_DATA | IMAGE_SCN_MEM_READ | IMAGE_SCN_MEM_WRITE)

// ================================================================================
// STRUCTURES
// ================================================================================

#pragma pack(push, 1)

typedef struct _SECTION_TEMPLATE {
    char        Name[8];
    DWORD       VirtualSize;
    DWORD       VirtualAddress;
    DWORD       SizeOfRawData;
    DWORD       PointerToRawData;
    DWORD       PointerToRelocations;
    DWORD       PointerToLinenumbers;
    WORD        NumberOfRelocations;
    WORD        NumberOfLinenumbers;
    DWORD       Characteristics;
} SECTION_TEMPLATE, *PSECTION_TEMPLATE;

typedef struct _PEGENCTX {
    // Output buffer
    LPVOID      pBuffer;
    SIZE_T      BufferSize;
    LPVOID      CurrentOffset;
    
    // PE Headers
    LPVOID      pDosHeader;
    LPVOID      pNtHeaders;
    LPVOID      pFileHeader;
    LPVOID      pOptionalHeader;
    LPVOID      pDataDirectory;
    LPVOID      pSectionHeaders;
    DWORD       NumSections;
    
    // Section tracking
    ULONGLONG   SectionVirtualAddr;
    ULONGLONG   SectionRawAddr;
    
    // Encoding state
    ULONGLONG   EncoderKey;
    DWORD       EncoderMethod;
    BYTE        IsEncoded;
    
    // Import/Export tracking
    LPVOID      pImportTable;
    DWORD       NumImports;
    LPVOID      pExportTable;
    DWORD       NumExports;
    
    // Entry point
    DWORD       EntryPointRVA;
    LPVOID      EntryPointRaw;
} PEGENCTX, *PPEGENCTX;

#pragma pack(pop)

// ================================================================================
// FUNCTION PROTOTYPES
// ================================================================================

// Core initialization
BOOL __stdcall PeGen_Initialize(PPEGENCTX pContext, SIZE_T InitialBufferSize);
BOOL __stdcall PeGen_CreateDosHeader(PPEGENCTX pContext);
BOOL __stdcall PeGen_CreateNtHeaders(PPEGENCTX pContext, ULONGLONG ImageBase, WORD Subsystem);

// Section management
BOOL __stdcall PeGen_AddSection(
    PPEGENCTX pContext,
    const char* pName,
    DWORD VirtualSize,
    DWORD RawSize,
    DWORD Characteristics,
    const void* pData
);

// Encoding
BOOL __stdcall PeGen_EncodeSection(PPEGENCTX pContext, DWORD SectionIndex, DWORD Method);
void __stdcall Encoder_XOR(void* pData, SIZE_T Size, ULONGLONG Key);
void __stdcall Encoder_Rotate(void* pData, SIZE_T Size, ULONGLONG Key);
void __stdcall Encoder_Polymorphic(void* pData, SIZE_T Size, ULONGLONG Key);

// Imports
BOOL __stdcall PeGen_AddImport(PPEGENCTX pContext, const char* pDllName, const char* pFunctionName, WORD Ordinal);

// Finalization
BOOL __stdcall PeGen_Finalize(PPEGENCTX pContext, DWORD EntryPointRVA);
BOOL __stdcall PeGen_WriteToFile(PPEGENCTX pContext, const char* pFileName);
BOOL __stdcall PeGen_Cleanup(PPEGENCTX pContext);

// Utilities
DWORD __stdcall PeGen_CalculateChecksum(const void* pPEBuffer, SIZE_T Size);
BOOL __stdcall PeGen_UpdateChecksum(PPEGENCTX pContext);

// Decoder stub (for injection)
extern "C" void DecoderStub(void);
extern "C" DWORD DecoderStubSize;

// ================================================================================
// INLINE HELPERS
// ================================================================================

static inline DWORD AlignValue(DWORD value, DWORD alignment) {
    return (value + (alignment - 1)) & ~(alignment - 1);
}

static inline DWORD CalcRVA(const PPEGENCTX ctx, DWORD rawOffset) {
    return rawOffset + (DWORD)ctx->SectionVirtualAddr;
}

// Quick PE builder helper
static inline BOOL PeGen_BuildExecutable(
    PPEGENCTX ctx,
    const char* outputPath,
    void* code,
    DWORD codeSize,
    void* data,
    DWORD dataSize
) {
    if (!PeGen_Initialize(ctx, 0x100000)) return FALSE;
    if (!PeGen_CreateDosHeader(ctx)) return FALSE;
    if (!PeGen_CreateNtHeaders(ctx, 0x140000000ULL, IMAGE_SUBSYSTEM_WINDOWS_CUI)) return FALSE;
    
    // Add .text section
    if (code && codeSize > 0) {
        if (!PeGen_AddSection(ctx, ".text", 
            AlignValue(codeSize, 0x1000), 
            AlignValue(codeSize, 0x200), 
            SEC_CODE, code)) {
            return FALSE;
        }
    }
    
    // Add .data section
    if (data && dataSize > 0) {
        if (!PeGen_AddSection(ctx, ".data",
            AlignValue(dataSize, 0x1000),
            AlignValue(dataSize, 0x200),
            SEC_DATA, data)) {
            return FALSE;
        }
    }
    
    // Set entry point to start of .text
    if (!PeGen_Finalize(ctx, 0x1000)) return FALSE;
    if (!PeGen_UpdateChecksum(ctx)) return FALSE;
    if (!PeGen_WriteToFile(ctx, outputPath)) return FALSE;
    
    return TRUE;
}

#ifdef __cplusplus
}
#endif

## 🏗️ Architecture

```
PE Generation Pipeline:
├─ PeGen_Initialize() → Allocates RWX buffer, generates entropy key
├─ PeGen_CreateDosHeader() → MZ header + minimal DOS stub  
├─ PeGen_CreateNtHeaders() → PE32+ headers (COFF + Optional)

│  └─ Supports: .text, .data, .rdata, custom sections
├─ PeGen_EncodeSection() → Runtime encoding (3 methods)
│  ├─ XOR: key ^ data
│  ├─ Rotate: ROR(ADD(data, key))  
│  └─ Polymorphic: XOR→Rotate→XOR triple layer
├─ PeGen_Finalize() → Calculates SizeOfImage, sets EP
├─ PeGen_UpdateChecksum() → PE checksum validation
└─ PeGen_WriteToFile() → Disk output
```

## 🔐 Encoder Features

- **Runtime Decoder Stub**: Self-modifying decoder injected into PE
- **Multi-layer**: Polymorphic encoding prevents static analysis
- **Entropy Key**: RDTSC-based key generation
- **In-place**: Encoding modifies buffer directly, no allocation
